name: What jit-agents owns
definition: Agent spec parsing (YAML → typed AgentSpec). Spec resolution (tier-aware discovery; relative-to-absolute path resolution). Template compilation (Nunjucks env construction; prompt rendering; shared macro library; contextBlocks injection with framework-level anti-injection wrapping). Prompt building (system + task + output instructions). Mode selection (per DEC-0009 algorithm). Classifier-mode in-process dispatch (existing: phantom-tool forced toolChoice; single LLM call; output extraction + validation against outputSchema). Agentic-mode in-process dispatch (pending implementation: multi-tool dispatch loop wiring compiled.tools to LLM tool registry after DEC-0011 grant enforcement; iterate tool-call responses; invoke matching compiled ToolDefinition.execute(...), passing ExtensionContext as ctx; thread results; loop termination). Capability-grant enforcement (DEC-0011 reject-on-non-subset at executeAgent boundary; granted capabilities exercised at agentic-mode dispatch not discarded post-check). Phantom tool construction (classifier-mode). Output validation. Agent contract introspection. Model resolution (DEC-0001 ExtensionContext lookup; FGAP-115 interlock).
